title: Workshop: Build a Cooling-Center Experience Report
summary: Workshop: Build a Cooling-Center Experience Report retrieves prior skills in an original community cooling-center feedback and follow-up workflow scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply form purpose method, form labels instructions, form input types, form grouping options, form native validation in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real community cooling-center feedback and follow-up workflow artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
